DFFlagRemoveTrayUserAgentKeyword_Staged.mechanism: Removes specific keywords from the user agent string in the tray.
DFFlagRemoveTrayUserAgentKeyword_Staged.purpose: Improves privacy and reduces unnecessary data sharing for players.

FFlagRemoveExperienceMenuABTestManager.mechanism: Discontinues the A/B testing for the experience menu.
FFlagRemoveExperienceMenuABTestManager.purpose: Provides a consistent experience menu for all players without variations.

DFFlagEnableSystrayBackgroundAppUpdate.mechanism: Allows the Roblox app to update in the background without interrupting the user.
DFFlagEnableSystrayBackgroundAppUpdate.purpose: Ensures players always have the latest version without needing to manually update.

FFlagFixMissingIECUIForGrantedAssets.mechanism: Fixes a bug that prevented certain user interface elements from showing for granted assets.
FFlagFixMissingIECUIForGrantedAssets.purpose: Enhances user experience by ensuring all assets are properly displayed.

FFlagExplorerOptimizedHasChildren.mechanism: Optimizes the way the Explorer panel checks for child objects in a hierarchy.
FFlagExplorerOptimizedHasChildren.purpose: Improves performance and responsiveness when navigating complex game structures.

FFlagRenderMeshFidelityStats.mechanism: Enables detailed statistics for rendering mesh fidelity in games.
FFlagRenderMeshFidelityStats.purpose: Helps developers understand and improve the visual quality of their games.

DFFlagBezierUseCorrectIterationCount.mechanism: Adjusts the algorithm for calculating curves to use the correct number of iterations.
DFFlagBezierUseCorrectIterationCount.purpose: Improves the accuracy of curved paths in games, making them look smoother and more realistic.

FFlagAndroidHevcEncoderCheck_Staged.mechanism: Enables a check for using a more efficient video encoding format on Android devices.
FFlagAndroidHevcEncoderCheck_Staged.purpose: Enhances video quality and reduces file size for smoother gameplay on mobile devices.
